CustomField.description: Concatenating State, Country and Postalcode value (Source: S-692579)
CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(Account_Name__c), Lead_Name__r.State & ';' & ' ' & Lead_Name__r.Country & ';' & ' ' & Lead_Name__r.PostalCode , Account_Name__r.ShippingState & ';' & ' ' & Account_Name__r.ShippingCountry & ';' & ' ' & Account_Name__r.ShippingPostalCode )
CustomField.label: fxPKITerritory Address
